name: Insert an Image into a Document

steps.tooltip: Let's start by clicking the **Insert** tab in the ribbon at the top of the screen. This is where all the options for adding things — like images, tables, and shapes — live.
Great! Now click **Pictures** in the Insert ribbon. This opens up the options for where you want to grab your image from.
Choose **This Device** from the dropdown to browse for an image saved on your computer. You can also pick from online sources later, but let's keep it local for now.
A file browser will open. Navigate to the folder where your image is saved, then click on the image file to select it. It'll be highlighted when selected.
Almost there! Click the **Insert** button in the bottom-right corner of the file browser to drop the image into your document at the current cursor position.
Your image should now appear in the document. You'll see a selection box around it with handles — you can drag the corners to resize it, or click and drag it anywhere on the page. Nice work! 🎉
